zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Clements於1292年出生在英國斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓時，她的父親Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton20歲，母親Hervey Clements29歲。她於大約1312年與Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Clements于1292年出生在英国斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓时，她的父亲Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton20岁，母亲Hervey Clements29岁。她于大约1312年与Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall在英国英格兰斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clements
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish (Tyrone and Antrim), and Dutch: variant of Clement , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. German Clementz and Slovenian patronymic Klemenc (see Klements ).

variants.name: Clemence
meanings: English and French: from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Clemence (from Latin clementia ‘mildness’).
In some cases also an Americanized form of Slovenian Klemenc (see Klements ).

variants.name: Clement
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Alcide, Alphonse, Andre, Marcel, Armand, Cecile, Christophe, Gaston, Olivier, Aime.

English, Catalan, German, Flemish, and Dutch; French and Walloon (Clément): from the Latin personal name Clemens meaning ‘merciful’ (genitive Clementis). This achieved popularity firstly through having been borne by an early Christian saint who was a disciple of Saint Paul, and later because it was selected as a symbolic name by a number of early popes. There has also been some confusion with the personal name Clemence (from Latin Clementia, meaning ‘mercy’, an abstract noun derived from the adjective; in part a masculine name from Latin Clementius, a later derivative of Clemens). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, especially Italian Clemente , and also their derivatives.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Clements was born in 1292, in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, her father, Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton, was 20 and her mother, Hervey Clements, was 29. She married Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall about 1312, in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1350, in England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Clements est née en 1292, à Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Hervey Clements, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall environ 1312, à Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Clements 1292 in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton 20 und ihre Mutter Hervey Clements 29. Sie hat um 1312 in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 58 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Clements è nata il nel 1292 nel Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Hervey Clements, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall circa 1312, nel Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Clementsが1292年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウオルバーハンプトンで生まれた時，父Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhamptonは20歳，母Hervey Clementsは29歳であった。約1312年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウオルバーハンプトンでRichard Leveson II , of Willenhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリスで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Clements(이)가 1292년 영국 스태퍼드실르 울버함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hervey Clements(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 울버함프턴에서 Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Clements nasceu em 1292, em Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Hervey Clements, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall aproximadamente 1312, em Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Clements родилась в 1292 г. в местности волвирамптон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Hervey Clements, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall около 1312 г. в местности волвирамптон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Clements nació en 1292, en Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry FitzClement , of Wolverhampton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Hervey Clements, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Richard Leveson II , of Willenhall aproximadamente 1312, en Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
